title: AIO - Villager Bucket
description:
Easy villager transport and storage!!

Just store him in a bucket :)
body:
# Villager Bucket.

This DataPack is made for capturing villagers in a bucket and store it in your inventory.
You can release the villager out of the bucket when needed.

### *NOTE* : Professions wont be copied.

Advantages:
- Nitwits can be converted to normal villagers this way
- The villager is not "locked" to a profession.
  
# Usage:

Capturing:

- Stand next to the villager with an empty bucket in your main hand and right-click

Releasing:

- Put the "Villager Bucket" in your main hand and right-click
